I use Foyer in-memory (not hybrid) in ZeroFS [0] and had a great experience with it.The only quirk I’ve experienced is that in-memory and hybrid modes don’t share the same invalidation behavior. In hybrid mode, there’s no way to await a value being actually discarded after deletion, while in-memory mode shows immediate deletion.[0] https://github.com/Barre/ZeroFS
